title: Data Types
description: Python has several built-in data types: int, float, str, bool, NoneType.

exercises.prompt: Create one variable of each type: int, float, str, bool. Print the type of each using type().
exercises.solution:
x = 42
y = 3.14
s = 'hello'
b = True
print(type(x), type(y), type(s), type(b))
